titleStmt.title: SII 34.190: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 190. Ratnagiri, Kulittalai Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the rock near a spring behid the Harāḷakēśvari temple on the hill.

summary.p: This is a record of sale of land, freed from taxes, by the sabhā of a village (name lost, but most probably Ariñjikai-chaturvēdimaṅgalam) in Uṟaiyūr-kūṟṟam in Kēraḷāntaka-vaḷanāḍu to the Vishṇu temple of Jananātha-viṇṇagar-Āḻvār in Mīkōṭṭu-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Uṭaiyār śrīrājentracōḻadevaṟkē yāṇṭu 2 10 1 Āvatē kēraḷān=takavaḷanāṭṭu Uṟaiūrk kūṟṟattu brahmadeyam
turvvedimaṅkalattu peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyōm Iṟaikāvalāka viṟṟukkuṭutta nilavilai Āvāṇam Innāṭṭu mīkoṭṭu nāṭṭu
tirumēṟkōyilāṉa jananāta viṇṇakar Āḻvārkku nāṅkaḷē cantrātittaval Iṟai Iṟuttu kuṭukka kaṭavōmāka viṟṟukkuṭutta nila
kavaṉ yil tiruvaraṅka vāykkālukku teṟku cōḻamātēvi vatikkuk kiḻakku nālāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟum Añcāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟum vaṭakkaṭai
ṭṭivittan nilattilp pa kku teṟku nilattil vaṭakkaṭaiya sabhaiyōmitāṉa cantrātta val Iṟai
Iṟuttu koḷḷak kaṭavōmāka viṟṟukkuṭuttukkoṇṭa vilaipporuḷ kuṟṟa maṟṟa Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu
100 2 10 Ikkācu nūṟṟirupatum koṇṭu Innilam 1/2 yum Iṟaikāvalāka viṟṟukkuṭuttOm Ittiru
śaturvveti maṅkalattupperuṅkuṟi sabhaiyOm Innilattukku ItuvE vilaiyāvaṇamum poruḷmā
poruḷ Ōlai kāṭṭakkaṭavarallātārākavum Ipparicu cuṭṭi peruvari cilvari Eccōṟu veṭṭi
vācalil pōnta kuṭimai Eppēr paṭṭatum nāṅkaḷē Iṟukka kaṭavōmākavum Innīr veṭṭi pācci
tum Āvaṇakkaḷiyē c cella Aṟakkoṇṭu Innilam viṟṟu Ippiramāṇappaṭi kalveṭṭik
ṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ cētukuṭuttōm
caturvvetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyōm Amittanūr
koṉṟai tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇak kiramavittaṉum paṇiyāl
patilum Inilam Araikkum vilaikāṇi Iṟaikāvalāka
kuṟi sabhaiyōm paṇiyāl
Digital edition of SII 34.190 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
